primary_text:
If your pet sees the vet twice a year, you are already paying more than Best for Pet.

Two consults: $260+. Vaccinations: $95. Dental: $350+. Parasite prevention: $120+. That is $800 to $1,300 in routine care.

Best for Pet: $50/month. Unlimited consults. All vaccinations. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests. 24/7 virtual vet access.

Not insurance. No claims. No excess.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: Two vet visits? You are overpaying.
description: $50/month. Unlimited consults, vaccinations, $250 off dental. Not insurance.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
creative_brief: Calculator visual with stacking costs vs single $50/month line.
